arts.ttl: Man City injury, suspension news and return dates for Liverpool clash: Stones, Haaland, Akanji, Bobb latest
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up Manchester City's injury and suspension news ahead of their Premier League clash with Liverpool on Sunday.

arts.ttl: 'Time to think' - Pep Guardiola talks Man City rebuild after Real Madrid exit
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola needs his players to achieve a new target before the end of the season as they fight for their futures

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe names who he wants to play next in Champions League after destroying Man City
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe was the star of the show as Real Madrid knocked Manchester City out of the Champions League thanks to his hat-trick and the forward has shared who he wants to face in the next round

arts.ttl: One Man City summer exit might have been decided in Madrid with Pep Guardiola's double snub
arts.sum: The moments you might have missed as Manchester City took on Real Madrid in their Champions League knockout play-off second leg.

arts.ttl: I saw moment Pep Guardiola knew Man City were beaten vs Real Madrid - before the game started
arts.sum: The moments you might have missed as Manchester City took on Real Madrid in their Champions League knockout play-off second leg.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand reveals worrying trait he's never seen from Pep Guardiola's Man City before in Champions League collapse against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's men have failed to reach the round of 16 for the first time since he took over, as Kylian Mbappe netted a stunning hat-trick to lead Los Blancos to a 3-1 victory at Santiago Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Haaland, Bradley, Saka: The early FPL Gameweek 26 team news
arts.sum: An injury overview of all 20 Premier League clubs The post Haaland, Bradley, Saka: The early FPL Gameweek 26 team news appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: We have to learn from Champions League exit
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says Manchester City have to accept that we were not good enough in the Champions League following our exit against Real Madrid. City are currently fourth in the Premier League and Guardiola is determined to carry on our run of qualifying for Europe’s top competition for the past 14 seasons.

arts.ttl: Man City out of Champions League as Kylian Mbappe hits hat-trick for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Mbappe helped the holders to a 3-1 victory in the second leg of their play-off tie against City on Wednesday and an overall 6-3 aggregate success.

arts.ttl: Why Is Jude Bellingham Suspended for Real Madrid's Next Champions League Game?
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham is suspended for Real Madrid's next Champions League game after picking up a yellow card against Manchester City.
